summaries.management: Stage 8 remains active. The project now preserves a validated preview/handoff checkpoint, a validated external UI brief baseline, a certified IA baseline, and a corrected post-fallback numbering plan that continues at Task 074.
summaries.customer_status: The design branch has cleared the information architecture gate and corrected its numbering so no existing future task files are overwritten. Next work focuses on the visual system before screen-level generation and final import.
summaries.last_iteration: Applied a numbering correction after the IA fallback branch so future active design tasks now run as 074 through 079.
